name: John
aboutText: John builds modern, interactive web interfaces using Vue, TypeScript, Tailwind, and other frontend technologies.
projects_desc1: This is a modern, responsive Admin Dashboard Template built with Vue 3 and Tailwind CSS
projects_desc2: A high-performance, modern cryptocurrency tracking application
projects_desc3: A high-performance, full-stack AI Chatbot built with Next.js 15 and the Vercel AI SDK
projects_desc4: An ultra-fast, responsive Movie Discovery application built with Nuxt 3 and Vue 3
